title: EnvelopeDefinition
description: The envelope definition object that contains all the properties needed to create and send an envelope.

emailSubject.description: The subject line of the email sent to recipients.

emailBlurb.description: The body text of the email sent to recipients.

status.description: The envelope status. Set to "sent" to send the envelope immediately, or "created" to save as a draft.

templateId.description: The ID of a template to use as the basis for the envelope. When specified, the template's documents, recipients, and tabs are merged with any specified in the request.

templateRoles.description: Template role assignments that map recipients to template roles when using a templateId.

documents.description: The documents to include in the envelope.

compositeTemplates.description: An array of composite template objects that combine server templates and inline templates for complex workflows.

brandId.description: The ID of the brand to apply to the envelope.

envelopeIdStamping.description: When true, the envelope ID is stamped in the document margins.
